messages.content: You write clear Russian encyclopedia articles for teenagers.

Generate the final Markdown article for a teen encyclopedia in Russian.

Style requirements:
- explain the topic in simple, friendly Russian for a teenager;
- do not mention that the text was written by an AI model;
- do not put QID, URI, API, JSON or technical Wikidata details into the main body;
- use clear level-2 sections;
- add natural internal links to related articles;
- avoid frightening tone, medical diagnosis claims, and invented statistics.

Expected structure:
1. A level-1 heading.
2. A short introduction.
3. Several meaningful sections.
4. A section with the main takeaway.
5. Sections for related articles, useful Wikidata concepts, and navigation.

Article context:
{
  "section_title": "Раздел 9. Я и Вселенная",
  "topic_title": "Время",
  "topic_slug": "Time",
  "topic_description": "Тема о том, как человек ощущает время, взрослеет, планирует будущее и распределяет внимание между делами и близкими.",
  "article_slug": "living-in-the-past-future-or-present",
  "article_title": "Жить прошлым, будущим или настоящим",
  "article_summary": "Как прошлое, настоящее и будущее помогают человеку, если не застревать только в одном из них.",
  "keywords": [
    "прошлое",
    "настоящее",
    "будущее",
    "планирование",
    "тревога"
  ],
  "aliases": [
    "жить прошлым",
    "жить настоящим",
    "жить будущим"
  ],
  "related_articles": [
    "childhood-ends-what-am-i-losing",
    "how-not-to-waste-time",
    "time-and-relationships-with-loved-ones"
  ],
  "wikidata_seed_labels": [
    "past",
    "present",
    "future",
    "planning"
  ],
  "concept_graph_nodes": [
    {
      "id": "memory",
      "label": "память",
      "kind": "cognitive",
      "description": "Способ сохранять прошлый опыт и связывать события в историю.",
      "article_refs": [
        "why-time-flies-or-drags",
        "childhood-ends-what-am-i-losing",
        "living-in-the-past-future-or-present"
      ]
    },
    {

      "kind": "temporal",
      "description": "То, что уже произошло и стало опытом или воспоминанием.",
      "article_refs": [
        "childhood-ends-what-am-i-losing",

      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "present",

      "article_refs": [

      ]
    },
    {

      "article_refs": [

note: Saved for lab reproducibility. The final text is stored in WEB and duplicated in generated.md.
